# GRC — Governance, Risk & Compliance

> **Generated:** 2026-04-28T11:41:10Z
> **Endpoint count:** 2064
> **Tags:** `GRC`, `Compliance`, `Risk Management`, `Audit`, `Policy`, `Evidence`

## Overview

Endpoints covering compliance frameworks (SOC2/ISO27001/PCI-DSS/GDPR/FedRAMP), evidence collection and vault, risk register, policy engine, vendor risk management (TPRM), audit management, GRC workflows, KPI/OKR tracking, executive reporting, data classification, privacy, DLP, and security awareness.

## Authentication

All endpoints (unless marked **Public**) require:

```
X-API-Key: <your-api-token>
```

Tokens are managed via **Admin > API Tokens** in the UI or `POST /api/v1/auth/token`.

Some endpoints require additional OAuth2-style scopes (`read:findings`, `write:findings`, `admin:all`).
The required scope is noted in each endpoint's **Auth** field.

## Error Response Format

All error responses follow:

```json
{
  "detail": "Human-readable error message",
  "error_code": "MACHINE_READABLE_CODE",
  "request_id": "uuid-v4"
}
```

## Pagination

List endpoints that support pagination accept:

| Parameter | Type | Default | Description |
|-----------|------|---------|-------------|
| `page` | integer | 1 | 1-based page number |
| `page_size` | integer | 50 | Items per page (max 500) |
| `cursor` | string | — | Cursor token for cursor-based pagination |

Paginated responses include:

```json
{
  "items": [...],
  "total": 1234,
  "page": 1,
  "page_size": 50,
  "next_cursor": "opaque-token"
}
```

---

## Endpoints


### 1. `POST` `/api/v1/rules/dsl/validate`

**Summary:** Validate DSL text

**Tags:** Dynamic Rule DSL

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Parse + validate DSL text; return compiled JSON or error list.

**Request Body:** `ValidateDSLIn`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `dsl_text` | str | Yes |  | Raw YAML or JSON rule text |
| `dsl_format` | str | No | yaml | 'yaml' or 'json' |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 2. `POST` `/api/v1/rules/dsl/publish`

**Summary:** Publish DSL rule (bumps version)

**Tags:** Dynamic Rule DSL

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Validate and publish. A new version is allocated for (org_id, key).

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | str | No | Organisation ID |

**Request Body:** `PublishDSLIn`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `key` | str | Yes |  | Stable rule key (matched against DSL `key`) |
| `dsl_text` | str | Yes |  | Raw YAML or JSON rule text |
| `dsl_format` | str | No | yaml | 'yaml' or 'json' |
| `severity` | Optional | No | None | Override severity; defaults to the DSL value. |
| `authored_by` | str | No |  | User/service that authored the rule |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

policy that can be reviewed, edited, and approved.

|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|

| `org_id` | str | No | default |  |
| `custom_title` | Optional | No | None | Override the default policy title |
| `review_days` | int | No | 365 | Days until next review (default 365) |

| `title` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `version` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `content` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `approved_by` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `effective_date` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `review_date` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `status` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `org_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `created_at` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `updated_at` | str | Yes |  |  |

**Tags:** executive-reports

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Generate a board-ready executive report for the requested type and period.  Returns the full report
including all sections.

**Request Body:** `GenerateReportRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `type` | ReportType | Yes |  | Report type to generate |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation identifier |
| `period_start` | Optional | No | None | Period start (ISO 8601). Defaults to 30 days ago. |
| `period_end` | Optional | No | None | Period end (ISO 8601). Defaults to now. |
| `frequency` | ReportFrequency | No | ReportFrequency.ON_DEMAND | Report frequency label |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `ExecutiveReport`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | str | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `title` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `type` | ReportType | Yes |  |  |
| `frequency` | ReportFrequency | No | ReportFrequency.ON_DEMAND |  |
| `org_id` | str | No | default |  |
| `created_at` | str | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `period_start` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `period_end` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `sections` | List | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `metadata` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `generated_by` | str | No | executive_report_engine |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 150. `POST` `/api/v1/kpis/record`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/kpis/record

**Tags:** kpis

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Record a single KPI data point.  Stores the value with timestamp, org, and category. Unit is
resolved automatically from built-in definitions.

**Request Body:** `KPIRecordRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | str | Yes |  | KPI name (e.g. mttd_minutes) |
| `value` | float | Yes |  | Numeric KPI value |
| `category` | KPICategory | Yes |  | KPI category |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation identifier |
| `period` | str | No |  | Reporting period label (e.g. 2026-04) |
| `metadata` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined |  |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `KPI`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | str | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `name` | str | Yes |  | Machine-readable KPI name (e.g. mttd_minutes) |
| `value` | float | Yes |  | Current KPI value |
| `target` | Optional | No | None | Target value for this KPI |
| `unit` | str | No |  | Unit of measure (minutes, %, count, etc.) |
| `trend` | KPITrend | No | KPITrend.STABLE | Direction of change vs. prior period |
| `category` | KPICategory | Yes |  | KPI category |
| `period` | str | No |  | Reporting period (e.g. 2026-04, daily, weekly) |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation identifier |
| `recorded_at` | datetime | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `metadata` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Return historical values for a named KPI.  Useful for trend charts on the CISO dashboard. Returns
list of {timestamp, value} dicts ordered chronologically.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `name` | path | str | Yes | — |
| `org_id` | query | str | No | Organisation identifier |
| `days` | query | int | No | Number of days of history to return |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `List`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 153. `PUT` `/api/v1/kpis/targets`

**Summary:** PUT /api/v1/kpis/targets

**Tags:** kpis

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Configure thresholds for a KPI.  Overwrites any existing target configuration for the named KPI.
Thresholds determine green/yellow/red health classification.

**Request Body:** `KPITargetRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | str | Yes |  | KPI name |
| `target` | float | Yes |  | Ideal target value |
| `yellow` | float | Yes |  | Yellow alert threshold |
| `red` | float | Yes |  | Red alert threshold |
| `higher_is_better` | bool | No | True | True for coverage/rate KPIs; False for MTTD/MTTR |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `KPITarget`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `kpi_name` | str | Yes |  | KPI name this target applies to |
| `target_value` | float | Yes |  | Ideal / goal value |
| `threshold_yellow` | float | Yes |  | Value at which KPI turns yellow |
| `threshold_red` | float | Yes |  | Value at which KPI turns red |
| `higher_is_better` | bool | No | True | True = higher values are better (e.g. coverage). False = lower values are better (e.g. MTTD). |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 154. `GET` `/api/v1/kpis/health`

**Summary:** GET /api/v1/kpis/health

**Tags:** kpis

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Return RAG (green/yellow/red) health status for all KPIs.  Uses configured thresholds to classify
each KPI. KPIs without recorded data or targets show as 'unknown'.

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|

**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 155. `GET` `/api/v1/kpis/executive`

**Summary:** GET /api/v1/kpis/executive

**Tags:** kpis

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Return top 10 KPIs for the CISO executive dashboard.  Prioritises: critical findings, MTTD, MTTR,
SLA compliance, compliance score, scan coverage, patch rate, false positive rate, connector uptime,
and vulnerability density.  Includes overall portfolio health (green/yellow/red) and per-KPI
breakdown.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | str | No | Organisation identifier |

|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `org_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `generated_at` | datetime | Yes |  |  |
| `overall_health` | KPIHealth | Yes |  |  |
| `kpis` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `green_count` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `yellow_count` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `red_count` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `unknown_count` | int | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)

### 174. `POST` `/api/v1/vendors`

**Summary:** Register a new vendor

**Tags:** Vendor Risk Management

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Registers a new vendor in the VRM registry. Auto-computes tier from data access level and
operational criticality. Automatically analyzes contract risks.

**Request Body:** `VendorCreateRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | str | Yes |  | Vendor name |
| `service_category` | ServiceCategory | Yes |  |  |
| `data_access_level` | DataAccessLevel | Yes |  |  |
| `is_core_operations` | bool | No | False | True if vendor supports core operations |
| `contract_start` | str | Yes |  | ISO-8601 contract start date (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| `contract_end` | str | Yes |  | ISO-8601 contract expiry date (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| `sla_terms` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `certifications` | List | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `primary_contact` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `description` | str | No |  | Brief description of the vendor relationship |
| `fourth_party_vendors` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | Vendor IDs used by this vendor (fourth-party dependencies) |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `VendorResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `name` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `service_category` | str | Yes |  |  |

### 182. `POST` `/api/v1/vendors/assess`

**Summary:** Auto-assess a vendor (engine)

**Tags:** Vendor Risk Management

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Runs automated risk assessment for a vendor: domain reputation, NVD CVE lookup, known breach
database, data handling classification, supply chain depth analysis. Returns composite risk score
0-100 (higher = safer).

**Request Body:** `AutoAssessRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | str | Yes |  | Vendor name |
| `domain` | Optional | No | None | Vendor domain (e.g. acme.com) |
| `data_access_level` | str | No | none | Data access level: none/public/internal/confidential/restricted/secret |
| `fourth_party_vendors` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | List of fourth-party vendor IDs used by this vendor |
| `vendor_id` | Optional | No | None | Existing vendor ID (optional) |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `AutoAssessResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `vendor_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `name` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `domain` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `risk_score` | float | Yes |  |  |
| `risk_level` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `findings` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `last_assessed` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `recommendations` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `cves` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `breach_matches` | List | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 196. `POST` `/api/v1/audit-analytics/ingest`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/audit-analytics/ingest

**Tags:** audit-analytics

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Ingest a single raw log line.  Supported formats: json, syslog, cef, leef. The line is parsed,
normalised, and persisted immediately.

**Request Body:** `IngestRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `raw` | str | Yes |  | Raw log line to ingest |
| `format` | LogFormat | No | LogFormat.JSON | Wire format of the log line |
| `org_id` | Optional | No | None | Override org_id (defaults to authenticated org) |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `IngestResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `entry_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `org_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `timestamp` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `severity` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `actor` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `action` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `checksum` | str | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 197. `POST` `/api/v1/audit-analytics/ingest/batch`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/audit-analytics/ingest/batch

**Tags:** audit-analytics

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Ingest multiple raw log lines in a single call.  Optionally runs anomaly detection over the batch
after ingestion. All lines must share the same wire format.

**Request Body:** `IngestBatchRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `lines` | List | Yes |  | List of raw log lines |
| `format` | LogFormat | No | LogFormat.JSON | Wire format shared by all lines |
| `run_anomaly_detection` | bool | No | True | Run anomaly detection on the batch |
| `org_id` | Optional | No | None |  |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `IngestBatchResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `ingested` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `anomalies_detected` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `anomaly_ids` | List | No | PydanticUndefined |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 198. `GET` `/api/v1/audit-analytics/search`

**Summary:** GET /api/v1/audit-analytics/search

**Tags:** audit-analytics

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Search audit log entries.  Combines FTS5 full-text search with structured field filters. All filters
are ANDed together.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `q` | query | str | No | Full-text search query (FTS5) |
| `actor` | query | Optional | No | None |
| `action` | query | Optional | No | None |
| `resource_type` | query | Optional | No | None |
| `severity` | query | Optional | No | debug\|info\|warning\|error\|critical |
| `outcome` | query | Optional | No | success\|failure |
| `status` | query | Optional | No | active\|archived\|legal_hold |
| `start` | query | Optional | No | ISO-8601 start timestamp |
| `end` | query | Optional | No | ISO-8601 end timestamp |
| `limit` | query | int | No | 100 |
| `offset` | query | int | No | 0 |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `SearchResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `total` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `limit` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `offset` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `query` | str | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

**Summary:** GET /api/v1/audit-analytics/anomalies

**Tags:** audit-analytics

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

List previously detected anomalies.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|

### 200. `POST` `/api/v1/audit-analytics/anomalies/detect`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/audit-analytics/anomalies/detect

**Tags:** audit-analytics

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Trigger on-demand anomaly detection over stored entries.  Scans entries within the optional [start,
end] window, applies all detection rules, persists new anomalies, and returns them.

**Request Body:** `DetectAnomaliesRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `start` | Optional | No | None | Start of window (ISO-8601) |
| `end` | Optional | No | None | End of window (ISO-8601) |
| `org_id` | Optional | No | None |  |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `DetectAnomaliesResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `anomalies` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `count` | int | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

**Tags:** audit-analytics

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

SOC2 / HIPAA compliance audit trail — who did what when.  Returns a time-ordered record of all
actions matching the filters, suitable for compliance reporting and evidence collection.

| `start` | query | Optional | No | ISO-8601 start timestamp |
| `end` | query | Optional | No | ISO-8601 end timestamp |
| `limit` | query | int | No | 1000 |
| `offset` | query | int | No | 0 |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `SearchResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `total` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `limit` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `offset` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `query` | str | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)

**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)

Get the current retention policy for the authenticated org.

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

### 203. `PUT` `/api/v1/audit-analytics/retention-policy`

**Summary:** PUT /api/v1/audit-analytics/retention-policy

**Tags:** audit-analytics

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Create or update the retention policy for the authenticated org.  - archive_after_days: entries
older than this are marked archived (default 90) - delete_after_days:  entries older than this are
permanently deleted (default 365) - legal_hold_actor_ids: actors whose entries are exempt from
deletion

**Request Body:** `RetentionPolicyIn`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `archive_after_days` | int | No | 90 |  |
| `delete_after_days` | int | No | 365 |  |
| `legal_hold_actor_ids` | List | No | PydanticUndefined |  |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `RetentionPolicyOut`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `org_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `archive_after_days` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `delete_after_days` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `legal_hold_actor_ids` | List | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 204. `POST` `/api/v1/audit-analytics/retention/apply`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/audit-analytics/retention/apply

**Tags:** audit-analytics

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Apply the retention policy for the authenticated org immediately.  Entries older than
archive_after_days are archived. Entries older than delete_after_days are deleted. Entries belonging
to legal-hold actors are marked as legal_hold. Returns a summary report.

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `RetentionReportOut`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `org_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `archived` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `deleted` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `held` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `skipped` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `run_at` | str | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 205. `POST` `/api/v1/audit-analytics/timeline`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/audit-analytics/timeline

**Tags:** audit-analytics

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Build a forensic timeline of audit events matching *query* within [start, end].  Returns events in
chronological order, plus actor and resource summaries. Useful for incident investigation and post-
mortem analysis.

**Request Body:** `TimelineRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `query` | str | Yes |  | FTS5-compatible search query |
| `start` | datetime | Yes |  |  |
| `end` | datetime | Yes |  |  |
| `limit` | int | No | 500 |  |
| `org_id` | Optional | No | None |  |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `ForensicTimelineOut`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `query` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `start` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `end` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `total` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `actors` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `resources` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `events` | List | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

remediation effort.

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Return all evidence items collected from ALDECI modules.  Each item includes the source module,
evidence type, whether it is currently passing, and whether it is stale (older than 30 days).

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|

### 227. `POST` `/api/v1/compliance/evidence/collect`

**Summary:** Trigger evidence collection

**Tags:** Compliance Automation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Trigger automated evidence collection from ALDECI modules.  Evidence is pulled from: scan results,
RBAC config, encryption settings, audit logs, config snapshots, policy documents, incident reports,
and training records.  If `control_id` is omitted, evidence is collected for all controls in the
framework.

**Request Body:** `CollectEvidenceRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `framework` | str | Yes |  | Target framework (SOC2, PCI-DSS, HIPAA, FedRAMP, ISO27001, NIST-800-53, CMMC) |
| `control_id` | Optional | No | None | Specific control ID; omit to collect for all controls in the framework |
| `org_id` | Optional | No | None | Organisation identifier |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

**Summary:** Cross-framework control mapping

**Tags:** Compliance Automation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Return cross-framework control mappings.  Shows that a single implementation can satisfy multiple
frameworks. Example: access control implementation covers SOC2 CC6.1 + PCI-DSS REQ-7 + HIPAA
164.312(a)(1) + NIST-800-53 AC-3 simultaneously.

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `List`

**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Create a Plan of Action and Milestones item for a failing control.

**Request Body:** `CreatePOAMRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `control_id` | str | Yes |  | Control ID the POA&M addresses |
| `framework` | str | Yes |  | Framework the control belongs to |
| `title` | str | Yes |  | Short title for the POA&M item |
| `description` | str | Yes |  | Detailed description of the finding and remediation plan |
| `responsible_party` | str | No | Security Team | Team or person responsible |
| `risk_level` | RemediationPriority | No | RemediationPriority.MEDIUM | Risk severity |
| `target_date` | Optional | No | None | ISO8601 target remediation date |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 231. `PATCH` `/api/v1/compliance/poam/{poam_id}`

**Summary:** Update POA&M status

**Tags:** Compliance Automation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Update the status of a POA&M item. Set `risk_accepted=true` to formally accept the residual risk
without remediation.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `poam_id` | path | str | Yes | — |

**Request Body:** `UpdatePOAMStatusRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `status` | POAMStatus | Yes |  | New status |
| `risk_accepted` | bool | No | False | Set true to mark the risk as formally accepted |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 232. `POST` `/api/v1/compliance/report/{framework}`

**Summary:** Generate audit-ready compliance report

**Tags:** Compliance Automation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Generate an audit-ready compliance report for a single framework.  The report includes: - Executive
summary (score, breakdown, gap count, open POA&M count) - Control-by-control status with evidence
references - Gap analysis with remediation roadmap - POA&M items - Remediation timeline sorted by
target date  Output is machine-readable JSON suitable for ingestion by GRC tools.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `framework` | path | str | Yes | — |
| `org_id` | query | Optional | No | Organisation identifier |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

| `likelihood_pct` | float | No | 50.0 | Likelihood of occurrence (0-100%) |
| `minimum_loss` | float | No | 0.0 | Minimum financial loss ($) |
| `maximum_loss` | float | No | 0.0 | Maximum financial loss ($) |

| `channels` | List | No | ['email'] |  |
| `format` | str | No | json |  |

| `org_id` | str | No | default |  |

**200 OK** — `Dict`

### 383. `POST` `/api/v1/iga/reviews`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/iga/reviews

**Tags:** iga

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Create an access review campaign.  Seeds review items automatically from the identity catalog based
on access_type.

**Request Body:** `CreateReviewRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | str | Yes |  | Human-readable review campaign name |
| `scope` | str | No | all | Scope description, e.g. 'Q2 privileged access review' |
| `reviewer_id` | str | Yes |  | User ID of the reviewer |
| `deadline` | str | Yes |  | ISO 8601 deadline, e.g. '2026-05-01T00:00:00Z' |
| `access_type` | str | No | all | Which accounts to include: 'privileged', 'service_accounts', or 'all' |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `CreateReviewResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `review_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `message` | str | No | Access review created |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 448. `POST` `/api/v1/scheduled-reports/seed-defaults`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/scheduled-reports/seed-defaults

**Tags:** Scheduled Reports

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Create the 3 canonical ALDECI report schedules for an org if they don't exist.  Schedules created: -
Daily Security Posture Summary (daily at 06:00 UTC) - Weekly Executive Briefing (Monday at 08:00
UTC) - Monthly Compliance Report (1st of month at 07:00 UTC)  Set overwrite=true to delete and re-
create any existing default schedules. Returns the list of newly created schedules (empty if all
already exist).

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | str | No | default |
| `overwrite` | query | bool | No | False |

**Responses:**


**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 541. `POST` `/api/v1/risk-aggregator/scores`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/risk-aggregator/scores

**Tags:** Risk Aggregator

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Record a risk score for an entity from any source engine.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | str | No | default |

**Request Body:** `RecordRiskScoreRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `entity_id` | str | Yes |  | Unique identifier for the entity |
| `entity_name` | Optional | No |  | Human-readable entity name |
| `entity_type` | str | No | asset | asset \| user \| network \| application \| vendor |
| `source_engine` | Optional | No |  | Engine producing the score |
| `risk_score` | float | Yes |  | Risk score 0-100 |
| `risk_factors` | Optional | No | PydanticUndefined | Contributing risk factors |
| `severity` | Optional | No | None | Override severity: critical \| high \| medium \| low (auto-derived if omitted) |

**Responses:**

**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)

### 550. `POST` `/api/v1/risk-aggregator/sync`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/risk-aggregator/sync

**Tags:** Risk Aggregator

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Trigger a manual sync of risk scores from the Knowledge Brain graph.  Reads all finding nodes for
the org from the brain graph, computes risk scores from CVSS / severity / exposure properties, and
stores them in the risk_scores table so that /stats and /org-score reflect real ASPM data.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | str | No | default |
| `brain_db_path` | query | Optional | No | Override path to fixops_brain.db (defaults to FIXOPS_BRAIN_DB_PATH env or data/fixops_brain.db) |

**Responses:**


**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | str | No | Organisation ID |

**Request Body:** `UnifiedRuleCreate`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `rule_key` | str | Yes |  | Canonical cross-engine key, e.g. 'sast.sql.injection' |
| `domain` | str | Yes |  | sast/dast/secrets/iac/container/cspm/api_security/... |
| `category` | str | Yes |  | Subcategory within domain |
| `severity` | str | Yes |  | critical/high/medium/low/info |
| `rule_type` | str | Yes |  | detection/validation/compliance/posture/hardening |
| `source_engine` | str | Yes |  | Originating engine (e.g. sast_engine, secrets_scanner) |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 604. `POST` `/api/v1/risk-quant/scenarios`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/risk-quant/scenarios

**Tags:** Risk Quantification v2

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Create a FAIR risk scenario with computed SLE and ALE.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | str | No | default |

**Request Body:** `ScenarioCreate`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `scenario_name` | str | Yes |  | Scenario name |
| `asset_name` | str | Yes |  | Asset under threat |
| `threat_actor` | str | Yes |  | Threat actor description |
| `threat_type` | str | No | malware | malware/ransomware/insider/ddos/phishing/supply_chain/physical/natural_disaster/system_failure |
| `asset_value` | float | No | 0.0 | Asset value in $ |
| `exposure_factor` | float | No | 0.5 | Exposure factor 0.0-1.0 |
| `annual_rate_occurrence` | float | No | 1.0 | Expected occurrences per year |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)

| `category` | query | Optional | No | Filter by category: incident_response\|remediation\|compliance\|hardening |
| `search` | query | Optional | No | Full-text search on name and description |
| `tags` | query | Optional | No | Comma-separated tag filter |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

| `soc2_report` | bool | No | False | SOC 2 report available |

| `format` | str | No | json | One of: ['json', 'html', 'pdf'] |
| `filters` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined |  |

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/policy-generator/generate

**Tags:** policy-generator

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Auto-generate a security policy document from built-in best-practice templates.  Returns a DRAFT
policy that can be reviewed, edited, and approved.

**Request Body:** `GeneratePolicyRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `type` | PolicyType | Yes |  |  |
| `org_id` | str | No | default |  |
| `custom_title` | Optional | No | None | Override the default policy title |
| `review_days` | int | No | 365 | Days until next review (default 365) |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `PolicyResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `type` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `title` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `version` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `content` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `approved_by` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `effective_date` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `review_date` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `status` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `org_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `created_at` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `updated_at` | str | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 988. `POST` `/api/v1/audit/logs/chain`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/audit/logs/chain

**Tags:** audit

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Append an audit log and link it into the tamper-proof chain.  Each log entry's hash includes the
previous entry's hash, forming an immutable chain similar to a blockchain.

**Request Body:** `AuditLogCreate`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `event_type` | AuditEventType | Yes |  |  |
| `severity` | AuditSeverity | No | AuditSeverity.INFO |  |
| `user_id` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `resource_type` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `resource_id` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `action` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `details` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `ip_address` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `user_agent` | Optional | No | None |  |

**Responses:**


**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 994. `GET` `/api/v1/audit/trail`

**Summary:** Query write-operation audit trail (SOC2 CC7.2)

**Tags:** audit

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Query the write-operation audit trail.  Returns all POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE requests captured by the
WriteAuditMiddleware, scoped to the caller's org_id.  Each entry includes: timestamp, method, path,
actor_id, org_id, status_code, body_hash (SHA-256, never raw body), duration_ms, client_ip.  SOC2
CC7.2: Provides evidence of all state-changing API operations for security monitoring and anomaly
detection.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `method` | query | Optional | No | HTTP method filter (POST/PUT/PATCH/DELETE) |
| `path_prefix` | query | Optional | No | Path prefix filter |
| `actor_id` | query | Optional | No | Actor identifier filter |
| `since` | query | Optional | No | ISO-8601 start timestamp |
| `until` | query | Optional | No | ISO-8601 end timestamp |
| `status_code` | query | Optional | No | HTTP status code filter |
| `limit` | query | int | No | 100 |
| `offset` | query | int | No | 0 |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 995. `GET` `/api/v1/audit/trail/stats`

**Summary:** Write-audit trail statistics

**Tags:** audit

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Return aggregated statistics for the write-operation audit trail.  Includes: total write count,
error rate, method breakdown, top paths. Useful for SOC dashboards and anomaly alerting.

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 1019. `POST` `/api/v1/risk/simulate/fair`

**Summary:** Full FAIR model simulation

**Tags:** Monte Carlo Risk

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Run a full FAIR Monte Carlo simulation with custom parameters.

**Request Body:** `FAIRSimulationRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `tef_min` | float | No | 0.1 | Min threat event frequency (per year) |
| `tef_max` | float | No | 10.0 | Max threat event frequency |
| `tef_mode` | float | No | 2.0 | Most likely threat event frequency |
| `vuln_min` | float | No | 0.1 | Min vulnerability probability |
| `vuln_max` | float | No | 0.9 | Max vulnerability probability |
| `vuln_mode` | float | No | 0.5 | Most likely vulnerability probability |
| `primary_loss_min` | float | No | 10000 | Min primary loss ($) |
| `primary_loss_max` | float | No | 1000000 | Max primary loss ($) |
| `primary_loss_mode` | float | No | 100000 | Most likely primary loss ($) |
| `secondary_loss_min` | float | No | 50000 | Min secondary loss ($) |
| `secondary_loss_max` | float | No | 5000000 | Max secondary loss ($) |
| `secondary_loss_mode` | float | No | 500000 | Most likely secondary loss ($) |
| `slef_probability` | float | No | 0.3 | Secondary loss event probability |
| `asset_value` | float | No | 1000000 | Asset value ($) |
| `iterations` | int | No | 10000 | Monte Carlo iterations |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/evidence/bundles/generate

**Tags:** evidence

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Generate a new compliance evidence bundle.  Accepts a list of compliance frameworks, a date range,
and evidence categories.  Returns the generated bundle metadata including a content hash suitable
for downstream signing.  The UI sends ``frameworks`` (list of framework IDs), ``date_range``
(``{start, end}`` in YYYY-MM-DD), and ``categories`` (list of evidence category identifiers like
``findings``, ``remediations``, etc.).

### 1034. `GET` `/api/v1/evidence/bundles/{bundle_id}/download`

**Summary:** GET /api/v1/evidence/bundles/{bundle_id}/download

**Tags:** evidence

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Download an evidence bundle by ID.  Supports two output formats via the ``format`` query parameter:
* ``json`` (default) -- returns the bundle as a JSON document with   all findings, remediations,
risk scores, and audit trail data. * ``pdf`` -- returns a JSON representation of the PDF structure
(actual PDF rendering is handled client-side or by a future   rendering service).  If a physical
bundle file exists on disk it is served directly. Otherwise a synthetic JSON payload is generated
from demo data so the download always succeeds for demo / investor presentations.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `bundle_id` | path | str | Yes | — |
| `format` | query | Literal | No | Download format: 'json' for machine-readable or 'pdf' for auditor-friendly |

**Responses:**


**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1035. `POST` `/api/v1/evidence/bundles/{bundle_id}/verify`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/evidence/bundles/{bundle_id}/verify

**Tags:** evidence

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Verify the cryptographic integrity of an evidence bundle.  This endpoint is called by the
EvidenceBundles UI when the user clicks the "Verify" button on a bundle card.  It returns a
verification result containing hash match status, signature validity, the certificate chain, and the
issuer.  If the enterprise RSA verification module is available **and** a physical manifest exists
on disk, real cryptographic verification is performed.  Otherwise a deterministic demo result is
returned based on the bundle's known demo data (signature_valid field).

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `bundle_id` | path | str | Yes | — |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `BundleVerificationResult`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `valid` | bool | Yes |  | Overall verification result |
| `hash_match` | bool | Yes |  | Whether the content hash matches |
| `signature_valid` | bool | Yes |  | Whether the cryptographic signature is valid |
| `timestamp` | str | Yes |  | ISO-8601 timestamp of verification |
| `certificate_chain` | list | Yes |  | Certificate chain used for signing |
| `issuer` | str | Yes |  | Issuer of the signing certificate |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1036. `POST` `/api/v1/evidence/verify`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/evidence/verify

**Tags:** evidence

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Verify the RSA-SHA256 signature of an evidence bundle.  This endpoint verifies that an evidence
bundle has not been tampered with by checking its cryptographic signature against the stored
fingerprint.  The signature and fingerprint can be provided in the request body, or they will be
read from the bundle's manifest if not provided.

**Request Body:** `EvidenceVerifyRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `bundle_id` | str | Yes |  | The evidence bundle ID to verify |
| `signature` | Optional | No | None | Base64-encoded RSA signature (optional, will be read from manifest if not provided) |
| `fingerprint` | Optional | No | None | Public key fingerprint (optional, will be read from manifest if not provided) |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `EvidenceVerifyResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `bundle_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `verified` | bool | Yes |  |  |
| `fingerprint` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `signed_at` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `signature_algorithm` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `error` | Optional | No | None |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1038. `POST` `/api/v1/evidence/export`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/evidence/export

**Tags:** evidence

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Export a signed compliance evidence bundle with framework control mapping.  This is the primary
endpoint for DEMO-011: generates a complete compliance bundle with SOC2/PCI-DSS/HIPAA control
mapping, signs it with RSA-SHA256, and returns the verifiable bundle.  **Pillar**: V10 — CTEM Full
Loop with Cryptographic Proof  The bundle includes: - Framework-specific control assessments (SOC2
CC1-CC9, PCI-DSS 1-12, HIPAA) - Evidence items per control - Compliance posture scores - Gap
analysis - RSA-SHA256 digital signature (verifiable via /evidence/export/verify) - Content hash for
tamper detection  Use /evidence/export/verify to verify the signature of a returned bundle.

**Request Body:** `api.evidence_router.ExportRequest | None`

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1039. `POST` `/api/v1/evidence/export/verify`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/evidence/export/verify

**Tags:** evidence

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Verify the RSA-SHA256 signature of an exported compliance bundle.  Takes the full bundle JSON from
/evidence/export and verifies: 1. Content hash matches the bundle data 2. RSA-SHA256 signature is
valid against the signing key  **Pillar**: V10 — CTEM Full Loop with Cryptographic Proof  Returns
verification result with hash match, signature validity, and cryptographic details.

**Request Body:** `ExportVerifyRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `bundle` | dict | Yes |  | The full signed evidence bundle JSON |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1105. `POST` `/api/v1/reports/executive/generate`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/reports/executive/generate

**Tags:** executive-reports

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Generate a board-ready executive report for the requested type and period.  Returns the full report
including all sections.

**Request Body:** `GenerateReportRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `type` | ReportType | Yes |  | Report type to generate |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation identifier |
| `period_start` | Optional | No | None | Period start (ISO 8601). Defaults to 30 days ago. |
| `period_end` | Optional | No | None | Period end (ISO 8601). Defaults to now. |
| `frequency` | ReportFrequency | No | ReportFrequency.ON_DEMAND | Report frequency label |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `ExecutiveReport`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | str | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `title` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `type` | ReportType | Yes |  |  |
| `frequency` | ReportFrequency | No | ReportFrequency.ON_DEMAND |  |
| `org_id` | str | No | default |  |
| `created_at` | str | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `period_start` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `period_end` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `sections` | List | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `metadata` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `generated_by` | str | No | executive_report_engine |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 1128. `POST` `/api/v1/risk-quantifier/scenarios`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/risk-quantifier/scenarios

**Tags:** Risk Quantification

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Create a new FAIR risk scenario with financial parameters.  Returns the created scenario with its
assigned ID.

**Request Body:** `CreateScenarioRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | str | Yes |  | Human-readable scenario name |
| `threat_event` | str | Yes |  | Description of the threat event |
| `asset_value_usd` | float | Yes |  | Asset value in USD |
| `loss_magnitude_low` | float | Yes |  | Minimum loss estimate (USD) |
| `loss_magnitude_high` | float | Yes |  | Maximum loss estimate (USD) |
| `probability_low` | float | Yes |  | Min annual probability |
| `probability_high` | float | Yes |  | Max annual probability |
| `annual_loss_expectancy` | Optional | No | None | Optional ALE override |
| `scenario_id` | Optional | No | None | Optional explicit scenario ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/risk-quantifier/scenarios/{scenario_id}/quantify

**Tags:** Risk Quantification

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Run Monte Carlo simulation (1000 iterations) to quantify ALE for a scenario.  Returns ALE at 10th,
50th, 90th percentiles, risk tier, and recommended control investment.

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `scenario_id` | path | str | Yes | — |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

severity and asset_type using built-in templates. Useful for bulk triage without manual scenario
definition.

| `severity` | str | No | medium |  |
| `asset_type` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `asset_value_usd` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `description` | Optional | No | None |  |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)

**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

| `amount_usd` | float | No | 0.0 | One-time or initial cost (USD) |
| `annual_cost` | float | No | 0.0 | Recurring annual cost (USD) |
| `start_date` | Optional | No | None | Start date YYYY-MM-DD |
| `description` | str | No |  | Investment description |

### 1143. `GET` `/api/v1/security-roi/breach-estimate`

**Summary:** IBM breach cost model estimate

**Tags:** Security ROI

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Estimate breach cost using the IBM Cost of a Data Breach 2023 model.  Applies organization size and
industry multipliers to the $4.45M baseline.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_size` | query | str | No | small \| medium \| large \| enterprise |
| `industry` | query | str | No | healthcare \| financial \| technology \| etc. |
| `records_at_risk` | query | int | No | Number of records at risk |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 1144. `GET` `/api/v1/security-roi/risk-reduction`

**Summary:** Risk reduction from investments

**Tags:** Security ROI

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Calculate total risk reduction achieved by the org's security investments.  Uses Ponemon category-
weighted benchmarks. Overall reduction is capped at 85% (no security program eliminates all risk).

**Tags:** questionnaires

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Add or update a custom answer in the org's answer bank.

**Request Body:** `AddAnswerBankRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `question_key` | str | Yes |  | Canonical question text (lowercase) |
| `category` | QuestionCategory | Yes |  |  |
| `answer` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `evidence_refs` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `confidence` | float | No | 1.0 |  |
| `org_id` | str | No | default |  |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 1181. `POST` `/api/v1/kpis/record`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/kpis/record

**Tags:** kpis

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Record a single KPI data point.  Stores the value with timestamp, org, and category. Unit is
resolved automatically from built-in definitions.

**Request Body:** `KPIRecordRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | str | Yes |  | KPI name (e.g. mttd_minutes) |
| `value` | float | Yes |  | Numeric KPI value |
| `category` | KPICategory | Yes |  | KPI category |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation identifier |
| `period` | str | No |  | Reporting period label (e.g. 2026-04) |
| `metadata` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined |  |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `KPI`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | str | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `name` | str | Yes |  | Machine-readable KPI name (e.g. mttd_minutes) |
| `value` | float | Yes |  | Current KPI value |
| `target` | Optional | No | None | Target value for this KPI |
| `unit` | str | No |  | Unit of measure (minutes, %, count, etc.) |
| `trend` | KPITrend | No | KPITrend.STABLE | Direction of change vs. prior period |
| `category` | KPICategory | Yes |  | KPI category |
| `period` | str | No |  | Reporting period (e.g. 2026-04, daily, weekly) |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation identifier |
| `recorded_at` | datetime | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `metadata` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1182. `GET` `/api/v1/kpis/current`

**Summary:** GET /api/v1/kpis/current

**Tags:** kpis

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Return the most-recent value for every KPI recorded for this org.  Includes target and trend
(up/down/stable) derived from historical data.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | str | No | Organisation identifier |

**Responses:**

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)

### 1183. `GET` `/api/v1/kpis/trend/{name}`

**Summary:** GET /api/v1/kpis/trend/{name}

**Tags:** kpis

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Return historical values for a named KPI.  Useful for trend charts on the CISO dashboard. Returns
list of {timestamp, value} dicts ordered chronologically.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `name` | path | str | Yes | — |
| `org_id` | query | str | No | Organisation identifier |
| `days` | query | int | No | Number of days of history to return |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `List`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1184. `PUT` `/api/v1/kpis/targets`

**Summary:** PUT /api/v1/kpis/targets

**Tags:** kpis

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Configure thresholds for a KPI.  Overwrites any existing target configuration for the named KPI.
Thresholds determine green/yellow/red health classification.

**Request Body:** `KPITargetRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | str | Yes |  | KPI name |
| `target` | float | Yes |  | Ideal target value |
| `yellow` | float | Yes |  | Yellow alert threshold |
| `red` | float | Yes |  | Red alert threshold |
| `higher_is_better` | bool | No | True | True for coverage/rate KPIs; False for MTTD/MTTR |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `KPITarget`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `kpi_name` | str | Yes |  | KPI name this target applies to |
| `target_value` | float | Yes |  | Ideal / goal value |
| `threshold_yellow` | float | Yes |  | Value at which KPI turns yellow |
| `threshold_red` | float | Yes |  | Value at which KPI turns red |
| `higher_is_better` | bool | No | True | True = higher values are better (e.g. coverage). False = lower values are better (e.g. MTTD). |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1185. `GET` `/api/v1/kpis/health`

**Summary:** GET /api/v1/kpis/health

**Tags:** kpis

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Return RAG (green/yellow/red) health status for all KPIs.  Uses configured thresholds to classify
each KPI. KPIs without recorded data or targets show as 'unknown'.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | str | No | Organisation identifier |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `List`

**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1186. `GET` `/api/v1/kpis/executive`

**Summary:** GET /api/v1/kpis/executive

**Tags:** kpis

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Return top 10 KPIs for the CISO executive dashboard.  Prioritises: critical findings, MTTD, MTTR,
SLA compliance, compliance score, scan coverage, patch rate, false positive rate, connector uptime,
and vulnerability density.  Includes overall portfolio health (green/yellow/red) and per-KPI
breakdown.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | str | No | Organisation identifier |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `ExecutiveKPISummary`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `org_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `generated_at` | datetime | Yes |  |  |
| `overall_health` | KPIHealth | Yes |  |  |
| `kpis` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `green_count` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `yellow_count` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `red_count` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `unknown_count` | int | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 1221. `POST` `/api/v1/vendors`

**Summary:** Register a new vendor

**Tags:** Vendor Risk Management

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Registers a new vendor in the VRM registry. Auto-computes tier from data access level and
operational criticality. Automatically analyzes contract risks.

**Request Body:** `VendorCreateRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | str | Yes |  | Vendor name |
| `service_category` | ServiceCategory | Yes |  |  |
| `data_access_level` | DataAccessLevel | Yes |  |  |
| `is_core_operations` | bool | No | False | True if vendor supports core operations |
| `contract_start` | str | Yes |  | ISO-8601 contract start date (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| `contract_end` | str | Yes |  | ISO-8601 contract expiry date (YYYY-MM-DD) |
| `sla_terms` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `certifications` | List | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `primary_contact` | Optional | No | None |  |
| `description` | str | No |  | Brief description of the vendor relationship |
| `fourth_party_vendors` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | Vendor IDs used by this vendor (fourth-party dependencies) |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `VendorResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `name` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `service_category` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `data_access_level` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `is_core_operations` | bool | Yes |  |  |
| `tier` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `current_score` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `contract_start` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `contract_end` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `description` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `created_at` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `updated_at` | str | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 1229. `POST` `/api/v1/vendors/assess`

**Summary:** Auto-assess a vendor (engine)

**Tags:** Vendor Risk Management

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Runs automated risk assessment for a vendor: domain reputation, NVD CVE lookup, known breach
database, data handling classification, supply chain depth analysis. Returns composite risk score
0-100 (higher = safer).

**Request Body:** `AutoAssessRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | str | Yes |  | Vendor name |
| `domain` | Optional | No | None | Vendor domain (e.g. acme.com) |
| `data_access_level` | str | No | none | Data access level: none/public/internal/confidential/restricted/secret |
| `fourth_party_vendors` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | List of fourth-party vendor IDs used by this vendor |
| `vendor_id` | Optional | No | None | Existing vendor ID (optional) |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `AutoAssessResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `vendor_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `name` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `domain` | Optional | Yes |  |  |
| `risk_score` | float | Yes |  |  |
| `risk_level` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `findings` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `last_assessed` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `recommendations` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `cves` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `breach_matches` | List | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1232. `GET` `/api/v1/vendors/{vendor_id}/engine-scorecard`

**Summary:** Get engine-generated vendor scorecard

**Tags:** Vendor Risk Management

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Generates a composite vendor security scorecard from the automated assessment: domain score, CVE
score, breach score, data handling score, fourth-party score. Requires assess endpoint to have been
called first for this vendor.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `vendor_id` | path | str | Yes | — |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `EngineScorecardResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `vendor_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `vendor_name` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `overall_score` | float | Yes |  |  |
| `risk_level` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `grade` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `domain_score` | float | Yes |  |  |
| `cve_score` | float | Yes |  |  |
| `breach_score` | float | Yes |  |  |
| `data_handling_score` | float | Yes |  |  |

### 1294. `POST` `/api/v1/sbom/correlate`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/sbom/correlate

**Tags:** sbom-gap

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Correlate a SBOM against runtime vulnerability findings.  ALdeci differentiator: no competitor
correlates static SBOM with runtime findings to determine actual exploitability.  Accepts
multipart/form-data OR JSON body:  Multipart fields:   - sbom_file: the SBOM file (CycloneDX JSON or
SPDX JSON)   - org_id: (optional) organisation ID string   - findings_json: (optional) JSON string
of runtime findings list     If omitted, the latest pipeline findings for org_id are used.  JSON
body (alternative):   {     "sbom": {...},           # parsed SBOM dict     "findings": [...],
# runtime findings list     "org_id": "acme"         # optional   }  Returns:   CorrelationResult as
JSON — matched/unmatched components, risk deltas,   shadow dependency alert.

**Responses:**


**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1312. `GET` `/api/v1/findings/export/cef`

**Summary:** Export findings as CEF (Common Event Format) for SIEM ingestion

**Tags:** findings-gap

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Export all findings in ArcSight CEF v25 format.  Each line follows the format::
CEF:0|ALdeci|FixOps|1.0|{rule_id}|{title}|{sev_num}|src={asset}         dst={cve_id}
msg={description} cs1={risk_score} cs1Label=RiskScore         cs2={status} cs2Label=Status
cs3={scanner} cs3Label=Scanner         cs4={epss} cs4Label=EPSSScore cs5={kev}
cs5Label=KnownExploited         rt={timestamp}  Severity mapping: critical=10, high=7, medium=5,
low=3, info=1  Returns ``text/plain`` with ``Content-Disposition: attachment`` so SIEM collectors
(Splunk, IBM QRadar, Microsoft Sentinel, Elastic SIEM) can ingest the file directly.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `limit` | query | int | No | 10000 |

**Responses:**


**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1313. `GET` `/api/v1/findings/export/syslog`

**Summary:** Export findings as RFC 5424 syslog messages for Elastic SIEM

**Tags:** findings-gap

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Export findings as RFC 5424 syslog messages for Elastic SIEM / Logstash.  Each line follows the RFC
5424 format::      <PRI>1 TIMESTAMP HOSTNAME fixops PROCID MSGID [SD-ELEMENT] MSG  Where ``SD-
ELEMENT`` contains structured data: ``[fixops@57802 cve_id="..." risk_score="..." asset="..."
status="..." severity="..."]``  Severity to syslog priority (facility=1/user): critical=2 (CRIT),
high=3 (ERR), medium=4 (WARNING), low=6 (INFO), info=7 (DEBUG)  Returns ``text/plain`` with
``Content-Disposition: attachment`` so Elastic Filebeat / Logstash / rsyslog can ingest the file
directly.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `limit` | query | int | No | 10000 |

**Responses:**


**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

| `category` | query | Optional | No | Filter by category: discovery,attack,remediation,compliance,risk,intelligence,collaboration,system,ai |
| `event_type` | query | Optional | No | Filter by exact event type, e.g. finding.created |
| `entity_id` | query | Optional | No | Filter by related entity ID |
| `since` | query | Optional | No | ISO timestamp — return events after this time |
| `limit` | query | int | No | 50 |
| `offset` | query | int | No | 0 |

**200 OK** — `Dict`

### 1347. `POST` `/api/v1/audit-analytics/ingest`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/audit-analytics/ingest

**Tags:** audit-analytics

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Ingest a single raw log line.  Supported formats: json, syslog, cef, leef. The line is parsed,
normalised, and persisted immediately.

**Request Body:** `IngestRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `raw` | str | Yes |  | Raw log line to ingest |
| `format` | LogFormat | No | LogFormat.JSON | Wire format of the log line |
| `org_id` | Optional | No | None | Override org_id (defaults to authenticated org) |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `IngestResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `entry_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `org_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `timestamp` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `severity` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `actor` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `action` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `checksum` | str | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1348. `POST` `/api/v1/audit-analytics/ingest/batch`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/audit-analytics/ingest/batch

**Tags:** audit-analytics

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Ingest multiple raw log lines in a single call.  Optionally runs anomaly detection over the batch
after ingestion. All lines must share the same wire format.

**Request Body:** `IngestBatchRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `lines` | List | Yes |  | List of raw log lines |
| `format` | LogFormat | No | LogFormat.JSON | Wire format shared by all lines |
| `run_anomaly_detection` | bool | No | True | Run anomaly detection on the batch |
| `org_id` | Optional | No | None |  |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `IngestBatchResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `ingested` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `anomalies_detected` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `anomaly_ids` | List | No | PydanticUndefined |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1349. `GET` `/api/v1/audit-analytics/search`

**Summary:** GET /api/v1/audit-analytics/search

**Tags:** audit-analytics

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Search audit log entries.  Combines FTS5 full-text search with structured field filters. All filters
are ANDed together.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `q` | query | str | No | Full-text search query (FTS5) |
| `actor` | query | Optional | No | None |
| `action` | query | Optional | No | None |
| `resource_type` | query | Optional | No | None |
| `severity` | query | Optional | No | debug\|info\|warning\|error\|critical |
| `outcome` | query | Optional | No | success\|failure |
| `status` | query | Optional | No | active\|archived\|legal_hold |
| `start` | query | Optional | No | ISO-8601 start timestamp |
| `end` | query | Optional | No | ISO-8601 end timestamp |
| `limit` | query | int | No | 100 |
| `offset` | query | int | No | 0 |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `SearchResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `items` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `total` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `limit` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `offset` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `query` | str | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1351. `POST` `/api/v1/audit-analytics/anomalies/detect`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/audit-analytics/anomalies/detect

**Tags:** audit-analytics

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Trigger on-demand anomaly detection over stored entries.  Scans entries within the optional [start,
end] window, applies all detection rules, persists new anomalies, and returns them.

**Request Body:** `DetectAnomaliesRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `start` | Optional | No | None | Start of window (ISO-8601) |
| `end` | Optional | No | None | End of window (ISO-8601) |
| `org_id` | Optional | No | None |  |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `DetectAnomaliesResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `anomalies` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `count` | int | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error
