### 1354. `PUT` `/api/v1/audit-analytics/retention-policy`

**Summary:** PUT /api/v1/audit-analytics/retention-policy

**Tags:** audit-analytics

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Create or update the retention policy for the authenticated org.  - archive_after_days: entries
older than this are marked archived (default 90) - delete_after_days:  entries older than this are
permanently deleted (default 365) - legal_hold_actor_ids: actors whose entries are exempt from
deletion

**Request Body:** `RetentionPolicyIn`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `archive_after_days` | int | No | 90 |  |
| `delete_after_days` | int | No | 365 |  |
| `legal_hold_actor_ids` | List | No | PydanticUndefined |  |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `RetentionPolicyOut`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `org_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `archive_after_days` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `delete_after_days` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `legal_hold_actor_ids` | List | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1355. `POST` `/api/v1/audit-analytics/retention/apply`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/audit-analytics/retention/apply

**Tags:** audit-analytics

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Apply the retention policy for the authenticated org immediately.  Entries older than
archive_after_days are archived. Entries older than delete_after_days are deleted. Entries belonging
to legal-hold actors are marked as legal_hold. Returns a summary report.

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `RetentionReportOut`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `org_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `archived` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `deleted` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `held` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `skipped` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `run_at` | str | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1356. `POST` `/api/v1/audit-analytics/timeline`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/audit-analytics/timeline

**Tags:** audit-analytics

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Build a forensic timeline of audit events matching *query* within [start, end].  Returns events in
chronological order, plus actor and resource summaries. Useful for incident investigation and post-
mortem analysis.

**Request Body:** `TimelineRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `query` | str | Yes |  | FTS5-compatible search query |
| `start` | datetime | Yes |  |  |
| `end` | datetime | Yes |  |  |
| `limit` | int | No | 500 |  |
| `org_id` | Optional | No | None |  |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `ForensicTimelineOut`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `query` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `start` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `end` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `total` | int | Yes |  |  |
| `actors` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `resources` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `events` | List | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1357. `POST` `/api/v1/risk/score/finding`

**Summary:** Score a single finding

**Tags:** composite-risk

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Compute composite risk score for a specific finding. Combines CVSS, EPSS, KEV, asset criticality,
SLA breach risk, and lateral movement signals into a single 0-100 score.

**Request Body:** `ScoreFindingRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `finding_id` | str | Yes |  | Finding identifier to score |
| `cve_id` | Optional | No | None | CVE ID associated with finding |
| `asset_id` | Optional | No | None | Asset affected by finding |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1358. `POST` `/api/v1/risk/score/asset`

**Summary:** Score an asset

**Tags:** composite-risk

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Compute composite risk score for an asset by aggregating all its finding scores (worst-case +
average blend).

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `asset_id` | str | Yes |  | Asset identifier to score |

**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 1372. `POST` `/api/v1/iga/reviews`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/iga/reviews

**Tags:** iga

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Create an access review campaign.  Seeds review items automatically from the identity catalog based
on access_type.

**Request Body:** `CreateReviewRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `name` | str | Yes |  | Human-readable review campaign name |
| `scope` | str | No | all | Scope description, e.g. 'Q2 privileged access review' |
| `reviewer_id` | str | Yes |  | User ID of the reviewer |
| `deadline` | str | Yes |  | ISO 8601 deadline, e.g. '2026-05-01T00:00:00Z' |
| `access_type` | str | No | all | Which accounts to include: 'privileged', 'service_accounts', or 'all' |
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `CreateReviewResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `review_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `message` | str | No | Access review created |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

**Summary:** Gap analysis with priority-ranked remediation roadmap

**Tags:** Compliance Automation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Identify controls that are failing, not started, or have stale evidence (>30 days).  Returns a
priority-ranked list (critical → high → medium → low) with recommended actions and estimated
remediation effort.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `framework` | query | Optional | No | Filter by framework; omit for all frameworks |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `List`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1391. `GET` `/api/v1/compliance/evidence`

**Summary:** Evidence inventory

**Tags:** Compliance Automation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Return all evidence items collected from ALDECI modules.  Each item includes the source module,
evidence type, whether it is currently passing, and whether it is stale (older than 30 days).

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `framework` | query | Optional | No | Filter by framework |
| `control_id` | query | Optional | No | Filter by control ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `List`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1392. `POST` `/api/v1/compliance/evidence/collect`

**Summary:** Trigger evidence collection

**Tags:** Compliance Automation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Trigger automated evidence collection from ALDECI modules.  Evidence is pulled from: scan results,
RBAC config, encryption settings, audit logs, config snapshots, policy documents, incident reports,
and training records.  If `control_id` is omitted, evidence is collected for all controls in the
framework.

**Request Body:** `CollectEvidenceRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `framework` | str | Yes |  | Target framework (SOC2, PCI-DSS, HIPAA, FedRAMP, ISO27001, NIST-800-53, CMMC) |
| `control_id` | Optional | No | None | Specific control ID; omit to collect for all controls in the framework |
| `org_id` | Optional | No | None | Organisation identifier |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1393. `GET` `/api/v1/compliance/crossmap`

**Summary:** Cross-framework control mapping

**Tags:** Compliance Automation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Return cross-framework control mappings.  Shows that a single implementation can satisfy multiple
frameworks. Example: access control implementation covers SOC2 CC6.1 + PCI-DSS REQ-7 + HIPAA
164.312(a)(1) + NIST-800-53 AC-3 simultaneously.

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `List`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1394. `GET` `/api/v1/compliance/poam`

**Summary:** POA&M list

**Tags:** Compliance Automation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Return all Plan of Action and Milestones items.  Each item tracks: failing control, responsible
party, target date, current status, risk level, and whether the risk has been formally accepted.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `framework` | query | Optional | No | Filter by framework |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `List`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1395. `POST` `/api/v1/compliance/poam`

**Summary:** Create a POA&M item

**Tags:** Compliance Automation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Create a Plan of Action and Milestones item for a failing control.

**Request Body:** `CreatePOAMRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `control_id` | str | Yes |  | Control ID the POA&M addresses |
| `framework` | str | Yes |  | Framework the control belongs to |
| `title` | str | Yes |  | Short title for the POA&M item |
| `description` | str | Yes |  | Detailed description of the finding and remediation plan |
| `responsible_party` | str | No | Security Team | Team or person responsible |
| `risk_level` | RemediationPriority | No | RemediationPriority.MEDIUM | Risk severity |
| `target_date` | Optional | No | None | ISO8601 target remediation date |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1396. `PATCH` `/api/v1/compliance/poam/{poam_id}`

**Summary:** Update POA&M status

**Tags:** Compliance Automation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Update the status of a POA&M item. Set `risk_accepted=true` to formally accept the residual risk
without remediation.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `poam_id` | path | str | Yes | — |

**Request Body:** `UpdatePOAMStatusRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `status` | POAMStatus | Yes |  | New status |
| `risk_accepted` | bool | No | False | Set true to mark the risk as formally accepted |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1397. `POST` `/api/v1/compliance/report/{framework}`

**Summary:** Generate audit-ready compliance report

**Tags:** Compliance Automation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Generate an audit-ready compliance report for a single framework.  The report includes: - Executive
summary (score, breakdown, gap count, open POA&M count) - Control-by-control status with evidence
references - Gap analysis with remediation roadmap - POA&M items - Remediation timeline sorted by
target date  Output is machine-readable JSON suitable for ingestion by GRC tools.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `framework` | path | str | Yes | — |
| `org_id` | query | Optional | No | Organisation identifier |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 1420. `POST` `/api/v1/risk-scoring/score`

**Summary:** Score a single finding

**Tags:** Risk Scoring

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Produce a composite risk score 0-100 for a finding using CVSS (40%), EPSS (25%), CISA KEV (20%),
asset criticality (15%).

**Request Body:** `ScoreFindingRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `finding` | Dict | Yes |  | Finding dict. Recognised keys: id/finding_id, cve_id/cve, severity/risk_level, cvss_score/cvss_base_score, asset_environment/environment, asset_criticality. |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1421. `POST` `/api/v1/risk-scoring/rank`

**Summary:** Rank findings by composite risk

**Tags:** Risk Scoring

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Score each finding and return them sorted highest-risk first. Also returns a prioritised remediation
queue with urgency tiers.

**Request Body:** `RankFindingsRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `findings` | List | Yes |  | List of finding dicts to rank. |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1422. `GET` `/api/v1/risk-scoring/summary`

**Summary:** Org-wide risk-scoring rollup

**Tags:** Risk Scoring

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Aggregate risk-scoring summary for a tenant: open finding count by tier, weighted-risk average,
distinct assets at risk, and overall exposure score. Drives dashboard cards that don't need per-
finding detail.

| `attack_vector` | str | No | phishing | phishing/supply_chain/zero_day/credential/physical |
| `target_asset_type` | str | No | data | data/infrastructure/application/personnel |
| `likelihood_pct` | float | No | 50.0 | Likelihood of occurrence (0-100%) |
| `minimum_loss` | float | No | 0.0 | Minimum financial loss ($) |
| `maximum_loss` | float | No | 0.0 | Maximum financial loss ($) |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

### 1580. `POST` `/api/v1/scheduled-reports/seed-defaults`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/scheduled-reports/seed-defaults

**Tags:** Scheduled Reports

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Create the 3 canonical ALDECI report schedules for an org if they don't exist.  Schedules created: -
Daily Security Posture Summary (daily at 06:00 UTC) - Weekly Executive Briefing (Monday at 08:00
UTC) - Monthly Compliance Report (1st of month at 07:00 UTC)  Set overwrite=true to delete and re-
create any existing default schedules. Returns the list of newly created schedules (empty if all
already exist).

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | str | No | default |
| `overwrite` | query | bool | No | False |

**Responses:**


**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/risk-aggregator/scores

**Tags:** Risk Aggregator

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Record a risk score for an entity from any source engine.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | str | No | default |

**Request Body:** `RecordRiskScoreRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `entity_id` | str | Yes |  | Unique identifier for the entity |
| `entity_name` | Optional | No |  | Human-readable entity name |
| `entity_type` | str | No | asset | asset \| user \| network \| application \| vendor |
| `source_engine` | Optional | No |  | Engine producing the score |
| `risk_score` | float | Yes |  | Risk score 0-100 |
| `risk_factors` | Optional | No | PydanticUndefined | Contributing risk factors |
| `severity` | Optional | No | None | Override severity: critical \| high \| medium \| low (auto-derived if omitted) |

**Responses:**


**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 1689. `POST` `/api/v1/risk-aggregator/sync`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/risk-aggregator/sync

**Tags:** Risk Aggregator

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Trigger a manual sync of risk scores from the Knowledge Brain graph.  Reads all finding nodes for
the org from the brain graph, computes risk scores from CVSS / severity / exposure properties, and
stores them in the risk_scores table so that /stats and /org-score reflect real ASPM data.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | str | No | default |
| `brain_db_path` | query | Optional | No | Override path to fixops_brain.db (defaults to FIXOPS_BRAIN_DB_PATH env or data/fixops_brain.db) |

**Responses:**


**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

| `security_questionnaire` | bool | No | False | Security questionnaire completed |
| `pen_test_report` | bool | No | False | Recent penetration test report provided |
| `soc2_report` | bool | No | False | SOC 2 report available |
| `gdpr_compliance` | bool | No | False | GDPR compliance confirmed |
| `insurance_certificate` | bool | No | False | Cyber insurance certificate on file |

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation identifier |
| `vendor_id` | str | Yes |  | ID of the vendor |
| `requirement_name` | str | Yes |  | Requirement name |
| `requirement_type` | str | Yes |  | One of: documentation, certification, audit, training, technical |
| `due_date` | str | Yes |  | Due date (ISO 8601 or YYYY-MM-DD) |
| `mandatory` | bool | No | True | Whether this requirement is mandatory |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

**Request Body:** `AddControlGapRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |

| `control_name` | str | Yes |  | Human-readable control name |
| `domain` | str | No |  | Control domain/category |
| `severity` | str | Yes |  | critical\|high\|medium\|low |
| `gap_description` | str | No |  | Description of the gap |
| `current_state` | str | No |  | Current implementation state |
| `required_state` | str | No |  | Required implementation state |
| `remediation_effort` | int | No | 0 | Estimated remediation hours |

**Responses:**


**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

Return a high-level compliance posture spanning all 7 frameworks: SOC2, PCI-DSS, HIPAA, FedRAMP, ISO
27001, NIST 800-53, CMMC.  Includes per-framework score, control breakdown, and an aggregate overall
score.

### 1800. `GET` `/api/v1/compliance/gaps`

**Summary:** Gap analysis with priority-ranked remediation roadmap

**Tags:** Compliance Automation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Identify controls that are failing, not started, or have stale evidence (>30 days).  Returns a
priority-ranked list (critical → high → medium → low) with recommended actions and estimated
remediation effort.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `framework` | query | Optional | No | Filter by framework; omit for all frameworks |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `List`

**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 1801. `GET` `/api/v1/compliance/evidence`

**Summary:** Evidence inventory

**Tags:** Compliance Automation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Return all evidence items collected from ALDECI modules.  Each item includes the source module,
evidence type, whether it is currently passing, and whether it is stale (older than 30 days).

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `framework` | query | Optional | No | Filter by framework |
| `control_id` | query | Optional | No | Filter by control ID |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `List`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1802. `POST` `/api/v1/compliance/evidence/collect`

**Summary:** Trigger evidence collection

**Tags:** Compliance Automation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Trigger automated evidence collection from ALDECI modules.  Evidence is pulled from: scan results,
RBAC config, encryption settings, audit logs, config snapshots, policy documents, incident reports,
and training records.  If `control_id` is omitted, evidence is collected for all controls in the
framework.

**Request Body:** `CollectEvidenceRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `framework` | str | Yes |  | Target framework (SOC2, PCI-DSS, HIPAA, FedRAMP, ISO27001, NIST-800-53, CMMC) |
| `control_id` | Optional | No | None | Specific control ID; omit to collect for all controls in the framework |
| `org_id` | Optional | No | None | Organisation identifier |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1803. `GET` `/api/v1/compliance/crossmap`

**Summary:** Cross-framework control mapping

**Tags:** Compliance Automation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Return cross-framework control mappings.  Shows that a single implementation can satisfy multiple
frameworks. Example: access control implementation covers SOC2 CC6.1 + PCI-DSS REQ-7 + HIPAA
164.312(a)(1) + NIST-800-53 AC-3 simultaneously.

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `List`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1805. `POST` `/api/v1/compliance/poam`

**Summary:** Create a POA&M item

**Tags:** Compliance Automation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Create a Plan of Action and Milestones item for a failing control.

**Request Body:** `CreatePOAMRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `control_id` | str | Yes |  | Control ID the POA&M addresses |
| `framework` | str | Yes |  | Framework the control belongs to |
| `title` | str | Yes |  | Short title for the POA&M item |
| `description` | str | Yes |  | Detailed description of the finding and remediation plan |
| `responsible_party` | str | No | Security Team | Team or person responsible |
| `risk_level` | RemediationPriority | No | RemediationPriority.MEDIUM | Risk severity |
| `target_date` | Optional | No | None | ISO8601 target remediation date |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

---

### 1806. `PATCH` `/api/v1/compliance/poam/{poam_id}`

**Summary:** Update POA&M status

**Tags:** Compliance Automation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Update the status of a POA&M item. Set `risk_accepted=true` to formally accept the residual risk
without remediation.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `poam_id` | path | str | Yes | — |

**Request Body:** `UpdatePOAMStatusRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `status` | POAMStatus | Yes |  | New status |
| `risk_accepted` | bool | No | False | Set true to mark the risk as formally accepted |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 1807. `POST` `/api/v1/compliance/report/{framework}`

**Summary:** Generate audit-ready compliance report

**Tags:** Compliance Automation

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Generate an audit-ready compliance report for a single framework.  The report includes: - Executive
summary (score, breakdown, gap count, open POA&M count) - Control-by-control status with evidence
references - Gap analysis with remediation roadmap - POA&M items - Remediation timeline sorted by
target date  Output is machine-readable JSON suitable for ingestion by GRC tools.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `framework` | path | str | Yes | — |
| `org_id` | query | Optional | No | Organisation identifier |

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/compliance-calendar/events

**Tags:** Compliance Calendar

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Create a compliance calendar event. Auto-creates a reminder record.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | str | Yes | Organization ID |

**Request Body:** `CreateEventRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `event_name` | str | Yes |  | Name of the compliance event |
| `event_type` | str | Yes |  | audit \| certification \| filing \| renewal \| review \| training \| assessment \| deadline |
| `framework` | str | Yes |  | SOC2 \| ISO27001 \| PCI-DSS \| HIPAA \| GDPR \| NIST \| CIS \| FedRAMP |
| `due_date` | str | Yes |  | Due date in YYYY-MM-DD format |
| `recurrence` | str | No | none | none \| weekly \| monthly \| quarterly \| annual |
| `owner` | str | No |  | Event owner/responsible party |
| `priority` | str | No | medium | critical \| high \| medium \| low |
| `reminder_days` | int | No | 7 | Days before due_date to send reminder |
| `notes` | str | No |  | Additional notes |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

**Description:**

Record the cost and ALE reduction of a fix.

**Parameters:**

| Name | In | Type | Required | Notes |
|------|----|------|----------|-------|
| `org_id` | query | str | No | default |

**Request Body:** `FixCostRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `finding_id` | str | Yes |  | Finding ID being fixed |
| `cost` | float | Yes |  | Cost of the fix in $ |
| `fixed_at` | str | Yes |  | ISO datetime when fix was deployed |
| `ale_reduced` | Optional | No | None | Optional explicit ALE reduction $. If omitted, inferred from severity. |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 2032. `POST` `/api/v1/executive/board-report`

**Summary:** Generate board report

**Tags:** Executive Dashboard

**Auth:** API Key required

**Description:**

Generate a one-page board-level executive risk report: risk-in-dollars headline, top 5 risks with
business impact, compliance summary, KPI summary, quarter-over-quarter trend, and board action
items.

**Request Body:** `BoardReportRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `org_id` | str | No | default | Organisation identifier |
| `fair_scenarios` | List | No | PydanticUndefined | FAIR risk scenarios to simulate |
| `compliance_data` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined | Regulation → compliance % mapping (e.g. {"soc2": 78.5}) |
| `kpi_values` | Dict | No | PydanticUndefined | KPI ID → current value mapping |
| `previous_kpi_values` | Optional | No | None | Prior-period KPI values for trend computation |
| `prior_quarter_risk_score` | Optional | No | None | Last quarter's risk score for QoQ delta calculation |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `BoardReportResponse`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `org_id` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `report_period` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `risk_headline_usd` | float | Yes |  |  |
| `risk_trend` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `top_5_risks` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `compliance_summary` | Dict | Yes |  |  |
| `kpi_summary` | Dict | Yes |  |  |
| `qoq_delta_pct` | float | Yes |  |  |
| `action_items` | List | Yes |  |  |
| `generated_at` | datetime | Yes |  |  |

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error

### 2044. `POST` `/api/v1/regulatory/regulations`

**Summary:** POST /api/v1/regulatory/regulations

**Tags:** regulatory

**Auth:** See app-level auth (API Key via `X-API-Key` header)

**Description:**

Track a new regulatory change.  Returns the assigned regulation ID.

**Request Body:** `RegulationCreate`

| Field | Type | Required | Default | Description |
|-------|------|----------|---------|-------------|
| `framework` | str | Yes |  | e.g. GDPR, PCI-DSS, NIS2 |
| `title` | str | Yes |  |  |
| `description` | str | No |  |  |
| `effective_date` | str | Yes |  | ISO-8601 date e.g. 2024-03-31 |
| `impact` | str | Yes |  | high \| medium \| low |
| `affected_controls` | List | No | PydanticUndefined |  |
| `status` | str | No | upcoming | upcoming \| active \| superseded |

**Responses:**

**200 OK** — `Dict`

**401** — Unauthorized (missing or invalid API key)
**403** — Forbidden (insufficient scope)
**422** — Validation Error (request body/params)
**500** — Internal Server Error
